description: This video discusses the evolution of money from the gold standard to the predominance of digital currency in today's economy.
topic_summary: The video explains how coins and paper notes were once tied to the gold standard [t=0:16], addressing issues of portability and divisibility [t=8:08]. It highlights that currently, physical currency represents a minor part of the monetary system, with digital money being the majority [t=13:68][t=19:04]. The gold standard is no longer in use, although gold reserves are maintained by countries [t=25:75].
